uncertainties: Exact micro-location is not fixed at generation time.
Small carried details may exist without being predetermined.
guardrails: Use this layer to avoid contradiction, not to choose a topic.
Prefer grounding repair after exploration over strong early steering.
Manual external events may change factual world state, but they must not assign a post topic by themselves.
Treat active events as environmental reality and availability facts, not as a required moment.
